Rung.Comment:
Step 400: Cathode Component Start EOAT Vac check
JEO - Added decision to move to conv wait only if cathode isn't available. - 10/11/14
take dummy picture while waiting for or picking.. point grey issue when running back to back inspections with different exposures
Rung.Text: LIM(412,seqRobot.Step,420)[OTE(iInhibitInspFault.2) ,OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave1) OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave2) ,XIC(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisCathodeLL,Camera.intInspection) ,XIO(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisCathodeSL,Camera.intInspection) ,ONS(Machine_Oneshots[8].15) [OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTU(Camera.bitComplete) OTL(Camera.bitRun_Request) ,RES(ctuCathodeVisionRetries) ] ,[XIC(Camera.bitErrorInspection) ,XIC(Camera.bitComplete) ,XIC(bCathDummyImageComplete) ] OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTE(bCathDummyImageComplete) ];

Rung.Comment: Step 412: move to location with approach to efficiently wait for cathode
Step 414: wait for cathode to be in location, travel to location when ready
Step 416: Pick up cathode with vacuum

Step 418: Move to cathode approach and check vacuum
JEO - Updated with hardcoded speed/accel/decel because Loc_Conv_Wait is a shared location and only needs to be slow for this move. - 08/07/14
JEO - Updated to move only a little bit in the z-axis at this slow speed to try and improve cycle time. Changed from a Jump to a Move. - 05/15/15
JEO - Updated to go to step 20 rather than 9 if working on stack in queue. - 10/22/15
Rung.Text: EQU(seqRobot.Step,418)XIC(seqRobot.Perm)CONCAT(Message_Robot[44],K_Str_Blank,seqRobot.Status)[XIC(System.Auto) XIO(Bit_RobotOnlyStepMode) ,XIC(seqRobot.StepNext) ][ONS(Machine_Oneshots[5].14) [[COP(s800.LocationConfig[Loc_Conv_Cathode],s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp],1) ,ADD(s800.World_Current_Value.Z,10,s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp].Coordinate.Z) ,MOV(45,s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp].Speed) ,MOV(5,s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp].Acceleration) ,MOV(60,s800.LocationConfig[iLocTemp].Deceleration) ,MOV(iLocTemp,s800.Commands.MoveLocationIndex) ,MOV(s800.Robot.MotionCounter,intMotionCounter) ] ,OTL(s800.Commands.Move_Req) ] ,XIC(s800.Robot.statFaulted) OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ,XIO(s800.Commands.Move_Req) NEQ(s800.Robot.MotionCounter,intMotionCounter) XIC(s800.Robot.Move_Complete) [XIC(I_EOAT_Vac) [MOV(419,seqRobot.Step) ,RES(Machine_Counters[25]) ,OTL(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) ] ,XIO(I_EOAT_Vac) [CTU(Machine_Counters[25],?,?) ,XIO(Machine_Counters[25].DN) MOV(414,seqRobot.Step) ,XIC(Machine_Counters[25].DN) [XIO(Bit_Working_On_Queue_Battery) MOV(9,seqRobot.Step) ,XIC(Bit_Working_On_Queue_Battery) MOV(20,seqRobot.Step) ,RES(Machine_Counters[25]) ,OTL(Sig_Robot_mispickCathode) OTL(Sig_Robot_Picked_Cathode) ] ,OTL(actRobotVac.ACT.Abort) ,OTL(Bit_Robot_Part_Missing_Trigger) ,OTL(_debug.3) ,OTL(seqRobot.Fault) ] ,MOV(0,s800.Commands.Approach_Height) ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ];

Rung.Comment:
Step 419: Move to cathode approach.
JEO - Added - 05/15/15
make sure we are done with the dummy image before allowing the actual inspection to occur
Step 425: Register part on EOAT need to save with bit/path 2 after vision upgrade so that an image is saved in the display folder
Rung.Text: EQU(seqRobot.Step,424)XIC(seqRobot.Perm)CONCAT(Message_Robot[47],K_Str_Blank,seqRobot.Status)[XIC(System.Auto) XIO(Bit_RobotOnlyStepMode) ,XIC(seqRobot.StepNext) ][[TON(Machine_Timers[5],?,?) ,OTL(O_Vision_Light_On) ] ,XIC(Machine_Timers[5].DN) [[OTU(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave1) OTL(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].Requests.bSave2) ,XIC(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisCathodeLL,Camera.intInspection) MOV(ivisCathodeLL,HMI.To_HMI.MainDisplayIndex) ,XIO(Bit_Part_Type_LL) MOV(ivisCathodeSL,Camera.intInspection) MOV(ivisCathodeSL,HMI.To_HMI.MainDisplayIndex) ] ,ONS(Machine_Oneshots[1].14) [CONCAT(strImageFolderPath,strImageDisplay,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strBackSlash,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strImage,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,DTOS(Camera.intInspection,strTemp) CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strTemp,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,CONCAT(vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2,strDotBMP,vbVisionPro.Cameras[0].SavePaths.strSavePath2) ,OTU(Camera.bitErrorInspection) OTU(Camera.bitComplete) OTL(Camera.bitRun_Request) ] ,[XIC(Camera.bitError) ,XIC(Camera.bitErrorInspection) ] [MOV(425,seqRobot.Step) ,XIC(ctuCathodeVisionRetries.DN) [OTL(Bit_Vision_Error) ,OTL(HMI.To_HMI.ChangeMainImage) ,MOV(426,seqRobot.Step) ] ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ,XIO(Camera.bitRun_Request) XIC(Camera.bitComplete) [MOV(426,seqRobot.Step) ,OTL(HMI.To_HMI.ChangeMainImage) ,OTU(seqRobot.StepNext) ] ] ];
